name: space-cart-logistics
title: Space Cart Logistics
author: gofarovich
description: Tile-sized rails and externally-routed carts (OHT/AMHS-style), simulated entirely in Lua. Milestone 2: rail connection bitmask (64-variation art) + cell-based motion (32-cell cart window, straight/turn paths, right-hand routing) with cell occupancy for following/waiting.
